description: Use this API to specify or return the option to enable or disable the solution connectivity checking option setting. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = connectivity_check(ival) ierr, ival = connectivity_check()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 1 by default; else output).

ival.description: no solution connectivity check before power flow solutions.
run solution connectivity check before each power flow solution.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
